entries.detail:
1→/// Card rendering with progressive terminal degradation.
     2→///
     3→/// Selects layout based on [`TermLevel`]: Dumb (ASCII) through TrueColor
     4→/// (double-line box, RGB gradient). The caller assembles [`CardView`] from
     5→/// `Meta` + optional AC plan data; renderers never read files.
     6→use std::collections::HashMap;
     7→
     8→use bop_core::Meta;
     9→
    10→use crate::termcaps::{TermCaps, TermLevel};
    11→
    12→mod basic;
    13→mod dumb;
    14→mod extended;
    15→mod full;
    16→mod truecolor;
    17→
    18→// ── Data structs ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    19→
    20→/// Flat view struct built from `Meta` + optional AC plan data.
    21→/// The renderer operates on this — no filesystem access needed.
    22→///
    23→/// Some fields (e.g. `glyph`, `token`, `stage`) are not consumed by every
    24→/// renderer but are part of the public data model for future consumers
    25→/// (spec 029 TUI, vibekanban provider).
    26→#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
    27→#[allow(dead_code)]
    28→pub struct CardView {
    29→    pub id: String,
    30→    pub state: String,
    31→    /// SMP playing-card glyph (U+1F0xx) — may be absent on older cards.
    32→    pub glyph: Option<String>,
    33→    /// BMP-safe suit+rank token (e.g. "♠A") for terminals that lack SMP.
    34→    pub token: Option<String>,
    35→    /// Human-readable title (falls back to `id`).
    36→    pub title: String,
    37→    /// Current pipeline stage (e.g. "implement", "qa").
    38→    pub stage: String,
    39→    /// Priority rank: 1=Urgent .. 4=Low; None = unset.
    40→    pub priority: Option<i64>,
    41→    /// Overall completion 0–100.
    42→    pub progress: u8,
    43→    /// Provider from the most recent run (e.g. "claude", "codex").
    44→    pub provider: Option<String>,
    45→    /// Wall-clock seconds from the most recent run.
    46→    pub elapsed_s: Option<u64>,
    47→    /// AC plan phase name (from `implementation_plan.json`).
    48→    pub phase_name: Option<String>,
    49→    /// Progress fraction within the current phase (0.0–1.0).
    50→    pub phase_frac: f32,
    51→    /// Human-readable failure reason (set on failed cards).
    52→    pub failure_reason: Option<String>,
    53→    /// Process exit code from the last run.
    54→    pub exit_code: Option<i32>,
    55→    /// Number of AC subtasks completed (from `implementation_plan.json`).
    56→    pub ac_subtasks_done: Option<usize>,
    57→    /// Total number of AC subtasks (from `implementation_plan.json`).
    58→    pub ac_subtasks_total: Option<usize>,
    59→}
    60→
    61→/// Summary statistics for the rendered board.
    62→///
    63→/// `by_state` is populated for downstream consumers (e.g. dashboard, TUI)
    64→/// even though current renderers use only aggregate fields.
    65→#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
    66→#[allow(dead_code)]
    67→pub struct Stats {
    68→    pub total: usize,
    69→    pub by_state: HashMap<String, usize>,
    70→    pub avg_duration_s: Option<f64>,
    71→    pub success_rate_pct: Option<f64>,
    72→}
    73→
    74→// ── Renderer trait ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    75→
    76→/// Trait implemented by each terminal-level renderer (dumb through truecolor).
    77→pub trait CardRenderer {
    78→    /// Section header line for a state group (e.g. "=== RUNNING (2) ===").
    79→    fn render_section_header(&self, label: &str, count: usize) -> String;
    80→
    81→    /// One row per card in the listing.
    82→    fn render_card_row(&self, card: &CardView) -> String;
    83→
    84→    /// Progress bar with optional phase annotation.
    85→    ///
    86→    /// When `ac_done` and `ac_total` are `Some`, renderers that support AC
    87→    /// plan data show an "N/T" count and switch to [`crate::acplan::half_circle_glyph`]
    88→    /// instead of the default moon-quarter glyph.
    89→    fn render_progress(
    90→        &self,
    91→        pct: u8,
    92→        phase: Option<&str>,
    93→        phase_frac: f32,
    94→        ac_done: Option<usize>,
    95→        ac_total: Option<usize>,
    96→    ) -> String;
    97→
    98→    /// Footer with summary statistics.
    99→    fn render_footer(&self, stats: &Stats) -> String;
   100→}
   101→
   102→// ── Conversion ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   103→
   104→/// Build a [`CardView`] from a [`Meta`] and its filesystem state directory name.
   105→///
   106→/// Fields not available from `Meta` (e.g. `phase_name`, `phase_frac`) are set
   107→/// to defaults — the caller may enrich them from AC plan data afterward.
   108→pub fn from_meta(meta: &Meta, state: &str) -> CardView {
   109→    let last_run = meta.runs.last();
   110→
   111→    CardView {
   112→        id: meta.id.clone(),
   113→        state: state.to_string(),
   114→        glyph: meta.glyph.clone(),
   115→        token: meta.token.clone(),
   116→        title: meta.title.clone().unwrap_or_else(|| meta.id.clone()),
   117→        stage: meta.stage.clone(),
   118→        priority: meta.priority,
   119→        progress: meta.progress.unwrap_or(0),
   120→        provider: last_run
   121→            .map(|r| r.provider.clone())
   122→            .filter(|s| !s.is_empty()),
   123→        elapsed_s: last_run.and_then(|r| r.duration_s),
   124→        phase_name: None,
   125→        phase_frac: 0.0,
   126→        failure_reason: meta.failure_reason.clone(),
   127→        exit_code: meta.exit_code,
   128→        ac_subtasks_done: None,
   129→        ac_subtasks_total: None,
   130→    }
   131→}
   132→
   133→// ── Board dispatch ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   134→
   135→/// Render a full board to a `String`, selecting the renderer by [`TermLevel`].
   136→///
   137→/// `views` is a list of `(section_label, cards)` pairs — one per state group.
   138→/// Width is re-queried from `caps` on every call (never cached).
   139→pub fn render_board(caps: &TermCaps, views: &[(String, Vec<CardView>)], stats: &Stats) -> String {
   140→    let renderer: Box<dyn CardRenderer> = select_renderer(caps);
   141→    let mut out = String::new();
   142→
   143→    for (i, (label, cards)) in views.iter().enumerate() {
   144→        out.push_str(&renderer.render_section_header(label, cards.len()));
   145→        out.push('\n');
   146→
   147→        for card in cards {
   148→            out.push_str(&renderer.render_card_row(card));
   149→            out.push('\n');
   150→
   151→            if card.progress > 0 || card.phase_name.is_some() {
   152→                out.push_str(&renderer.render_progress(
   153→                    card.progress,
   154→                    card.phase_name.as_deref(),
   155→                    card.phase_frac,
   156→                    card.ac_subtasks_done,
   157→                    card.ac_subtasks_total,
   158→                ));
   159→                out.push('\n');
   160→            }
   161→        }
   162→
   163→        // Blank line between sections (but not after the last).
   164→        if i < views.len() - 1 {
   165→            out.push('\n');
   166→        }
   167→    }
   168→
   169→    out.push_str(&renderer.render_footer(stats));
   170→    out.push('\n');
   171→
   172→    out
   173→}
   174→
   175→/// Pick the concrete renderer for the detected terminal level.
   176→fn select_renderer(caps: &TermCaps) -> Box<dyn CardRenderer> {
   177→    match caps.level {
   178→        TermLevel::Dumb => Box::new(dumb::DumbRenderer),
   179→        TermLevel::Basic => Box::new(basic::BasicRenderer),
   180→        TermLevel::Extended => Box::new(extended::ExtendedRenderer { width: caps.width }),
   181→        TermLevel::Full => Box::new(full::FullRenderer { width: caps.width }),
   182→        TermLevel::TrueColor => Box::new(truecolor::TrueColorRenderer {
   183→            width: caps.width,
   184→            two_column: caps.two_column,
   185→        }),
   186→    }
   187→}
   188→
   189→#[cfg(test)]
   190→mod tests {
   191→    use super::*;
   192→    use bop_core::{Meta, RunRecord};
   193→
   194→    #[test]
   195→    fn from_meta_basic_fields() {
   196→        let meta = Meta {
   197→            id: "test-card".into(),
   198→            stage: "implement".into(),
   199→            glyph: Some("\u{1F0AB}".into()),
   200→            token: Some("\u{2660}".into()),
   201→            title: Some("My Feature".into()),
   202→            priority: Some(2),
   203→            progress: Some(67),
   204→            created: chrono::Utc::now(),
   205→            ..Default::default()
   206→        };
   207→
   208→        let view = from_meta(&meta, "running");
   209→        assert_eq!(view.id, "test-card");
   210→        assert_eq!(view.state, "running");
   211→        assert_eq!(view.title, "My Feature");
   212→        assert_eq!(view.progress, 67);
   213→        assert_eq!(view.priority, Some(2));
   214→        assert!(view.provider.is_none());
   215→        assert!(view.elapsed_s.is_none());
   216→    }
   217→
   218→    #[test]
   219→    fn from_meta_title_defaults_to_id() {
   220→        let meta = Meta {
   221→            id: "no-title".into(),
   222→            stage: "pending".into(),
   223→            created: chrono::Utc::now(),
   224→            ..Default::default()
   225→        };
   226→
   227→        let view = from_meta(&meta, "pending");
   228→        assert_eq!(view.title, "no-title");
   229→    }
   230→
   231→    #[test]
   232→    fn from_meta_extracts_last_run() {
   233→        let meta = Meta {
   234→            id: "run-card".into(),
   235→            stage: "done".into(),
   236→            created: chrono::Utc::now(),
   237→            runs: vec![
   238→                RunRecord {
   239→                    provider: "codex".into(),
   240→                    duration_s: Some(60),
   241→                    ..Default::default()
   242→                },
   243→                RunRecord {
   244→                    provider: "claude".into(),
   245→                    duration_s: Some(180),
   246→                    ..Default::default()

3. Pass `git_root` down to `collect_card_views()`
4. In `collect_card_views()`, enrich each card view with plan data after `from_meta()`

entries.content: Now update the subtask status in the implementation plan:

Subtask 3-3 is complete. Here's a summary of what was done:

**Changes made to `crates/bop-cli/src/list.rs`:**

1. **Added import**: `use crate::acplan;` to access the plan enrichment functions

2. **Updated `collect_card_groups()`**: Added a single call to `acplan::find_git_root(root)` at the top of the function to discover the git/project root once, then passes `git_root.as_deref()` to all `collect_card_views()` calls (both root-level and team-level)

3. **Updated `collect_card_views()`**: 
   - Added `git_root: Option<&Path>` parameter
   - After `render::from_meta(&meta, state)`, creates a mutable `view` and calls `acplan::enrich_card_view(&mut view, &meta, gr)` when `git_root` is available
   - This populates `phase_name`, `phase_frac`, `progress`, `ac_subtasks_done`, and `ac_subtasks_total` on cards that have `ac_spec_id` set in their meta

**Verification**: All 26 list tests pass (`test result: ok`).
Let me start by reading the full file and understanding the current implementation.

entries.detail:
1→# AC implementation plan progress in Quick Look + CLI
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→Auto-Claude's `implementation_plan.json` has per-phase subtask state
     6→(pending / in_progress / completed) that gives a clear picture of how far
     7→along a job is. Neither the Quick Look card preview nor `bop list` surface
     8→this — only raw `progress: Int` from `meta.json` is shown. The goal is to
     9→pipe AC's phase/subtask tree into the card's visual layer with zero extra
    10→tooling: block progress bars in the CLI, and a dedicated "Plan" tab in Quick
    11→Look alongside the existing Subtasks tab.
    12→
    13→## Data model
    14→
    15→### 1. `ac_spec_id` field in `Meta`
    16→
    17→Add to `crates/bop-core/src/lib.rs`:
    18→
    19→```rust
    20→pub ac_spec_id: Option<String>,   // e.g. "022"
    21→```
    22→
    23→This is the only link needed. Quick Look and CLI resolve the full path:
    24→
    25→```
    26→<git_root>/.auto-claude/specs/<ac_spec_id>-*/implementation_plan.json
    27→```
    28→
    29→Use a glob search (`read_dir` + prefix match on `<ac_spec_id>-`) to find the
    30→spec dir — do not hardcode the slug.
    31→
    32→### 2. How `ac_spec_id` gets written
    33→
    34→Two entry points:
    35→
    36→**dispatch.nu** — when `write_approval` fires before spawning a pane, also
    37→search `.cards/` (all state dirs) for a card whose `meta.json` `id` matches
    38→the spec slug or whose `title` contains the spec ID. If found, write
    39→`ac_spec_id` into that card's meta. This is the dogfood path where bop uses
    40→itself to track its own development.
    41→
    42→**Adapter convention** — if an adapter runs AC internally, it can write
    43→`ac_spec_id` to `meta.json` via `write_meta` before exiting.
    44→
    45→For cards with no AC spec, `ac_spec_id` is absent — no change to rendering.
    46→
    47→## CLI changes (`crates/bop-cli/src/main.rs` or status command)
    48→
    49→### `bop list` / `bop status` inline progress
    50→
    51→When a card has `ac_spec_id` set, load `implementation_plan.json` and render
    52→a compact one-liner after the card row:
    53→
    54→```
    55→⚙ 022-atomic-write-meta   running   claude   6m 14s
    56→  ████████████░░░░  6/7   Phase 2: CLI + Docs  ◑
    57→```
    58→
    59→Format:
    60→- Block bar: 16 chars, `█` per completed subtask fraction, `░` remainder
    61→- `N/T` count: completed subtasks / total subtasks across all phases
    62→- Current phase name (truncated to 24 chars)
    63→- Phase completion half-circle: `○◔◑◕●` (0% 25% 50% 75% 100%)
    64→  - U+25CB, U+25D4, U+25D1, U+25D5, U+25CF — all BMP-safe
    65→
    66→Half-circle thresholds (fraction of subtasks in current phase done):
    67→- 0 % → `○`
    68→- 1–33 % → `◔`
    69→- 34–66 % → `◑`
    70→- 67–99 % → `◕`
    71→- 100 % → `●`
    72→
    73→Colors: completed subtasks = green, in_progress = amber, pending = dim.
    74→Only shown for cards where `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable file.
    75→
    76→### `bop status --watch` (spec 025)
    77→
    78→When the plan view is live, also reload `implementation_plan.json` on each
    79→notify event — it changes as the AC agent commits subtasks.
    80→
    81→## Quick Look changes (`macos/bop/PreviewViewController.swift`)
    82→
    83→### New tab: "Plan"
    84→
    85→Add `plan = "Plan"` to the `CardSection` enum (alongside `subtasks`).
    86→Show the tab only if `ac_spec_id` is set and `implementation_plan.json` loads.
    87→
    88→The Plan tab reads `implementation_plan.json` from the git root (walk up from
    89→the card dir via `../` until `.git` or `.auto-claude` is found).
    90→
    91→### New Codable structs
    92→
    93→```swift
    94→private struct AcPlan: Codable {
    95→    let phases: [AcPhase]
    96→}
    97→
    98→private struct AcPhase: Codable {
    99→    let id: String
   100→    let name: String
   101→    let subtasks: [AcSubtask]
   102→}
   103→
   104→private struct AcSubtask: Codable {
   105→    let id: String
   106→    let description: String
   107→    let status: String   // "pending" | "in_progress" | "completed"
   108→}
   109→```
   110→
   111→### Plan tab rendering
   112→
   113→Overall progress bar at top (same style as existing `subtasksTab` header):
   114→
   115→```
   116→8 of 12 subtasks complete          67%
   117→████████████░░░░░░░░
   118→```
   119→
   120→Then per-phase collapsible rows:
   121→
   122→```
   123→◉  Phase 1 — Crash Safety          ●●●●●  5/5
   124→   ✓ Make write_meta atomic
   125→   ✓ Make write_providers atomic
   126→   ✓ Add recover_orphans function
   127→   ✓ Call recover_orphans on startup
   128→   ✓ Add bop recover CLI command
   129→
   130→◔  Phase 2 — CLI + Docs            ●○○    1/3
   131→   ✓ Write result.md (in_progress)
   132→   ○ Run make check
   133→   ○ Final review
   134→```
   135→
   136→Glyph legend (BMP-safe, existing SF Symbols for Quick Look):
   137→- Phase status icon: `circle.fill` (done), `circle.lefthalf.filled` (partial),
   138→  `circle` (not started) — SF Symbols, no font dep
   139→- Subtask row: `checkmark.circle.fill` (completed, green),
   140→  `arrow.triangle.2.circlepath` (in_progress, amber), `circle` (pending, dim)
   141→  — matches the existing `subtasksTab` icon style
   142→
   143→Phase name row background: match existing card row style
   144→(`Color.black.opacity(0.15)` + `RoundedRectangle` border).
   145→
   146→### `BopCardMeta` addition
   147→
   148→```swift
   149→let acSpecId: String?
   150→
   151→enum CodingKeys: String, CodingKey {
   152→    // ... existing keys ...
   153→    case acSpecId = "ac_spec_id"
   154→}
   155→```
   156→
   157→Load `AcPlan` lazily when the Plan tab is first shown — do not block the
   158→initial card render. Use a `@State var acPlan: AcPlan? = nil` loaded in
   159→`.task { }` on the tab view.
   160→
   161→Git root discovery: walk parent dirs from `cardURL.deletingLastPathComponent()`
   162→until a dir containing `.auto-claude` is found, max 6 levels. Cache the result.
   163→
   164→## Acceptance
   165→
   166→- `Meta` has `ac_spec_id: Option<String>` field (serde rename `ac_spec_id`)
   167→- `bop list` renders block bar + phase half-circle for cards with `ac_spec_id`
   168→- `bop status --watch` reloads plan on file changes
   169→- Quick Look shows "Plan" tab when `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable plan
   170→- Plan tab shows overall block bar + per-phase subtask list with SF Symbol icons
   171→- Git root discovery walks up from card dir (max 6 levels)
   172→- `make check` passes
   173→- `output/result.md` with ASCII screenshot of CLI output and description of QL tab
   174→

entries.content:
Subtask 3-4 is complete. Here's a summary of what was done:

## Changes Made

**File modified:** `crates/bop-cli/src/list.rs`

### What changed in `list_cards_watch()`:

1. **Added `.auto-claude/specs/` to watched directories** — Uses `acplan::find_git_root(root)` to locate the git root from the cards directory, then watches `<git_root>/.auto-claude/specs/` recursively for plan file changes.

2. **Changed channel type from `()` to `bool`** — The channel now carries a boolean flag:
   - `true` = plan changed → force redraw regardless of card stats
   - `false` = card changed → redraw only if stats differ (existing behavior)

3. **Updated event filter** — The watcher thread now detects two types of events:
   - `implementation_plan.json` file changes → sends `true` (force redraw)
   - `.bop` extension events → sends `false` (check stats)
   - Extracted a shared `is_event()` closure for DRY event kind matching

4. **Updated receive logic** — The `tokio::select!` branch now extracts `force_redraw` from the channel and uses `if force_redraw || stats_changed` for the redraw decision, ensuring plan data changes trigger a full redraw even when card counts haven't changed.

### Verification: All 26 list tests pass ✅
I'll start by reading the full file and the spec to understand the task completely.

entries.detail:
1→# AC implementation plan progress in Quick Look + CLI
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→Auto-Claude's `implementation_plan.json` has per-phase subtask state
     6→(pending / in_progress / completed) that gives a clear picture of how far
     7→along a job is. Neither the Quick Look card preview nor `bop list` surface
     8→this — only raw `progress: Int` from `meta.json` is shown. The goal is to
     9→pipe AC's phase/subtask tree into the card's visual layer with zero extra
    10→tooling: block progress bars in the CLI, and a dedicated "Plan" tab in Quick
    11→Look alongside the existing Subtasks tab.
    12→
    13→## Data model
    14→
    15→### 1. `ac_spec_id` field in `Meta`
    16→
    17→Add to `crates/bop-core/src/lib.rs`:
    18→
    19→```rust
    20→pub ac_spec_id: Option<String>,   // e.g. "022"
    21→```
    22→
    23→This is the only link needed. Quick Look and CLI resolve the full path:
    24→
    25→```
    26→<git_root>/.auto-claude/specs/<ac_spec_id>-*/implementation_plan.json
    27→```
    28→
    29→Use a glob search (`read_dir` + prefix match on `<ac_spec_id>-`) to find the
    30→spec dir — do not hardcode the slug.
    31→
    32→### 2. How `ac_spec_id` gets written
    33→
    34→Two entry points:
    35→
    36→**dispatch.nu** — when `write_approval` fires before spawning a pane, also
    37→search `.cards/` (all state dirs) for a card whose `meta.json` `id` matches
    38→the spec slug or whose `title` contains the spec ID. If found, write
    39→`ac_spec_id` into that card's meta. This is the dogfood path where bop uses
    40→itself to track its own development.
    41→
    42→**Adapter convention** — if an adapter runs AC internally, it can write
    43→`ac_spec_id` to `meta.json` via `write_meta` before exiting.
    44→
    45→For cards with no AC spec, `ac_spec_id` is absent — no change to rendering.
    46→
    47→## CLI changes (`crates/bop-cli/src/main.rs` or status command)
    48→
    49→### `bop list` / `bop status` inline progress
    50→
    51→When a card has `ac_spec_id` set, load `implementation_plan.json` and render
    52→a compact one-liner after the card row:
    53→
    54→```
    55→⚙ 022-atomic-write-meta   running   claude   6m 14s
    56→  ████████████░░░░  6/7   Phase 2: CLI + Docs  ◑
    57→```
    58→
    59→Format:
    60→- Block bar: 16 chars, `█` per completed subtask fraction, `░` remainder
    61→- `N/T` count: completed subtasks / total subtasks across all phases
    62→- Current phase name (truncated to 24 chars)
    63→- Phase completion half-circle: `○◔◑◕●` (0% 25% 50% 75% 100%)
    64→  - U+25CB, U+25D4, U+25D1, U+25D5, U+25CF — all BMP-safe
    65→
    66→Half-circle thresholds (fraction of subtasks in current phase done):
    67→- 0 % → `○`
    68→- 1–33 % → `◔`
    69→- 34–66 % → `◑`
    70→- 67–99 % → `◕`
    71→- 100 % → `●`
    72→
    73→Colors: completed subtasks = green, in_progress = amber, pending = dim.
    74→Only shown for cards where `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable file.
    75→
    76→### `bop status --watch` (spec 025)
    77→
    78→When the plan view is live, also reload `implementation_plan.json` on each
    79→notify event — it changes as the AC agent commits subtasks.
    80→
    81→## Quick Look changes (`macos/bop/PreviewViewController.swift`)
    82→
    83→### New tab: "Plan"
    84→
    85→Add `plan = "Plan"` to the `CardSection` enum (alongside `subtasks`).
    86→Show the tab only if `ac_spec_id` is set and `implementation_plan.json` loads.
    87→
    88→The Plan tab reads `implementation_plan.json` from the git root (walk up from
    89→the card dir via `../` until `.git` or `.auto-claude` is found).
    90→
    91→### New Codable structs
    92→
    93→```swift
    94→private struct AcPlan: Codable {
    95→    let phases: [AcPhase]
    96→}
    97→
    98→private struct AcPhase: Codable {
    99→    let id: String
   100→    let name: String
   101→    let subtasks: [AcSubtask]
   102→}
   103→
   104→private struct AcSubtask: Codable {
   105→    let id: String
   106→    let description: String
   107→    let status: String   // "pending" | "in_progress" | "completed"
   108→}
   109→```
   110→
   111→### Plan tab rendering
   112→
   113→Overall progress bar at top (same style as existing `subtasksTab` header):
   114→
   115→```
   116→8 of 12 subtasks complete          67%
   117→████████████░░░░░░░░
   118→```
   119→
   120→Then per-phase collapsible rows:
   121→
   122→```
   123→◉  Phase 1 — Crash Safety          ●●●●●  5/5
   124→   ✓ Make write_meta atomic
   125→   ✓ Make write_providers atomic
   126→   ✓ Add recover_orphans function
   127→   ✓ Call recover_orphans on startup
   128→   ✓ Add bop recover CLI command
   129→
   130→◔  Phase 2 — CLI + Docs            ●○○    1/3
   131→   ✓ Write result.md (in_progress)
   132→   ○ Run make check
   133→   ○ Final review
   134→```
   135→
   136→Glyph legend (BMP-safe, existing SF Symbols for Quick Look):
   137→- Phase status icon: `circle.fill` (done), `circle.lefthalf.filled` (partial),
   138→  `circle` (not started) — SF Symbols, no font dep
   139→- Subtask row: `checkmark.circle.fill` (completed, green),
   140→  `arrow.triangle.2.circlepath` (in_progress, amber), `circle` (pending, dim)
   141→  — matches the existing `subtasksTab` icon style
   142→
   143→Phase name row background: match existing card row style
   144→(`Color.black.opacity(0.15)` + `RoundedRectangle` border).
   145→
   146→### `BopCardMeta` addition
   147→
   148→```swift
   149→let acSpecId: String?
   150→
   151→enum CodingKeys: String, CodingKey {
   152→    // ... existing keys ...
   153→    case acSpecId = "ac_spec_id"
   154→}
   155→```
   156→
   157→Load `AcPlan` lazily when the Plan tab is first shown — do not block the
   158→initial card render. Use a `@State var acPlan: AcPlan? = nil` loaded in
   159→`.task { }` on the tab view.
   160→
   161→Git root discovery: walk parent dirs from `cardURL.deletingLastPathComponent()`
   162→until a dir containing `.auto-claude` is found, max 6 levels. Cache the result.
   163→
   164→## Acceptance
   165→
   166→- `Meta` has `ac_spec_id: Option<String>` field (serde rename `ac_spec_id`)
   167→- `bop list` renders block bar + phase half-circle for cards with `ac_spec_id`
   168→- `bop status --watch` reloads plan on file changes
   169→- Quick Look shows "Plan" tab when `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable plan
   170→- Plan tab shows overall block bar + per-phase subtask list with SF Symbol icons
   171→- Git root discovery walks up from card dir (max 6 levels)
   172→- `make check` passes
   173→- `output/result.md` with ASCII screenshot of CLI output and description of QL tab
   174→

entries.content:
Subtask-4-1 is complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**Changes to `macos/bop/PreviewViewController.swift`:**

1. **`BopCardMeta`** — Added `acSpecId: String?` field with `CodingKey` mapping to `"ac_spec_id"` (follows the existing pattern of `zellijSession`/`zellijPane`)

2. **New Codable structs** — Added three private structs after `RoadmapSnapshot`:
   - `AcPlan` — wraps an array of `AcPhase`
   - `AcPhase` — has `id`, `name`, and `subtasks` array
   - `AcSubtask` — has `id`, `description`, and `status` (pending/in_progress/completed)

3. **`CardTab` enum** — Added `.plan = "Plan"` case (between `.subtasks` and `.logs`)

4. **`BopCardPreview`** — Added `@State var acPlan: AcPlan? = nil`, `availableTabs` computed property (filters `.plan` out unless `acSpecId` is set AND `acPlan` is loaded), `tabName(for:)` updated for plan tab to show `"Plan (N/T)"`, tab bar switched from `CardTab.allCases` to `availableTabs`, and a stub `planTab()` view builder added

5. **Build verified**: `BUILD SUCCEEDED` ✅
I'll start by reading the full current file and the spec to understand what's needed.

entries.detail:
1→# AC implementation plan progress in Quick Look + CLI
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→Auto-Claude's `implementation_plan.json` has per-phase subtask state
     6→(pending / in_progress / completed) that gives a clear picture of how far
     7→along a job is. Neither the Quick Look card preview nor `bop list` surface
     8→this — only raw `progress: Int` from `meta.json` is shown. The goal is to
     9→pipe AC's phase/subtask tree into the card's visual layer with zero extra
    10→tooling: block progress bars in the CLI, and a dedicated "Plan" tab in Quick
    11→Look alongside the existing Subtasks tab.
    12→
    13→## Data model
    14→
    15→### 1. `ac_spec_id` field in `Meta`
    16→
    17→Add to `crates/bop-core/src/lib.rs`:
    18→
    19→```rust
    20→pub ac_spec_id: Option<String>,   // e.g. "022"
    21→```
    22→
    23→This is the only link needed. Quick Look and CLI resolve the full path:
    24→
    25→```
    26→<git_root>/.auto-claude/specs/<ac_spec_id>-*/implementation_plan.json
    27→```
    28→
    29→Use a glob search (`read_dir` + prefix match on `<ac_spec_id>-`) to find the
    30→spec dir — do not hardcode the slug.
    31→
    32→### 2. How `ac_spec_id` gets written
    33→
    34→Two entry points:
    35→
    36→**dispatch.nu** — when `write_approval` fires before spawning a pane, also
    37→search `.cards/` (all state dirs) for a card whose `meta.json` `id` matches
    38→the spec slug or whose `title` contains the spec ID. If found, write
    39→`ac_spec_id` into that card's meta. This is the dogfood path where bop uses
    40→itself to track its own development.
    41→
    42→**Adapter convention** — if an adapter runs AC internally, it can write
    43→`ac_spec_id` to `meta.json` via `write_meta` before exiting.
    44→
    45→For cards with no AC spec, `ac_spec_id` is absent — no change to rendering.
    46→
    47→## CLI changes (`crates/bop-cli/src/main.rs` or status command)
    48→
    49→### `bop list` / `bop status` inline progress
    50→
    51→When a card has `ac_spec_id` set, load `implementation_plan.json` and render
    52→a compact one-liner after the card row:
    53→
    54→```
    55→⚙ 022-atomic-write-meta   running   claude   6m 14s
    56→  ████████████░░░░  6/7   Phase 2: CLI + Docs  ◑
    57→```
    58→
    59→Format:
    60→- Block bar: 16 chars, `█` per completed subtask fraction, `░` remainder
    61→- `N/T` count: completed subtasks / total subtasks across all phases
    62→- Current phase name (truncated to 24 chars)
    63→- Phase completion half-circle: `○◔◑◕●` (0% 25% 50% 75% 100%)
    64→  - U+25CB, U+25D4, U+25D1, U+25D5, U+25CF — all BMP-safe
    65→
    66→Half-circle thresholds (fraction of subtasks in current phase done):
    67→- 0 % → `○`
    68→- 1–33 % → `◔`
    69→- 34–66 % → `◑`
    70→- 67–99 % → `◕`
    71→- 100 % → `●`
    72→
    73→Colors: completed subtasks = green, in_progress = amber, pending = dim.
    74→Only shown for cards where `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable file.
    75→
    76→### `bop status --watch` (spec 025)
    77→
    78→When the plan view is live, also reload `implementation_plan.json` on each
    79→notify event — it changes as the AC agent commits subtasks.
    80→
    81→## Quick Look changes (`macos/bop/PreviewViewController.swift`)
    82→
    83→### New tab: "Plan"
    84→
    85→Add `plan = "Plan"` to the `CardSection` enum (alongside `subtasks`).
    86→Show the tab only if `ac_spec_id` is set and `implementation_plan.json` loads.
    87→
    88→The Plan tab reads `implementation_plan.json` from the git root (walk up from
    89→the card dir via `../` until `.git` or `.auto-claude` is found).
    90→
    91→### New Codable structs
    92→
    93→```swift
    94→private struct AcPlan: Codable {
    95→    let phases: [AcPhase]
    96→}
    97→
    98→private struct AcPhase: Codable {
    99→    let id: String
   100→    let name: String
   101→    let subtasks: [AcSubtask]
   102→}
   103→
   104→private struct AcSubtask: Codable {
   105→    let id: String
   106→    let description: String
   107→    let status: String   // "pending" | "in_progress" | "completed"
   108→}
   109→```
   110→
   111→### Plan tab rendering
   112→
   113→Overall progress bar at top (same style as existing `subtasksTab` header):
   114→
   115→```
   116→8 of 12 subtasks complete          67%
   117→████████████░░░░░░░░
   118→```
   119→
   120→Then per-phase collapsible rows:
   121→
   122→```
   123→◉  Phase 1 — Crash Safety          ●●●●●  5/5
   124→   ✓ Make write_meta atomic
   125→   ✓ Make write_providers atomic
   126→   ✓ Add recover_orphans function
   127→   ✓ Call recover_orphans on startup
   128→   ✓ Add bop recover CLI command
   129→
   130→◔  Phase 2 — CLI + Docs            ●○○    1/3
   131→   ✓ Write result.md (in_progress)
   132→   ○ Run make check
   133→   ○ Final review
   134→```
   135→
   136→Glyph legend (BMP-safe, existing SF Symbols for Quick Look):
   137→- Phase status icon: `circle.fill` (done), `circle.lefthalf.filled` (partial),
   138→  `circle` (not started) — SF Symbols, no font dep
   139→- Subtask row: `checkmark.circle.fill` (completed, green),
   140→  `arrow.triangle.2.circlepath` (in_progress, amber), `circle` (pending, dim)
   141→  — matches the existing `subtasksTab` icon style
   142→
   143→Phase name row background: match existing card row style
   144→(`Color.black.opacity(0.15)` + `RoundedRectangle` border).
   145→
   146→### `BopCardMeta` addition
   147→
   148→```swift
   149→let acSpecId: String?
   150→
   151→enum CodingKeys: String, CodingKey {
   152→    // ... existing keys ...
   153→    case acSpecId = "ac_spec_id"
   154→}
   155→```
   156→
   157→Load `AcPlan` lazily when the Plan tab is first shown — do not block the
   158→initial card render. Use a `@State var acPlan: AcPlan? = nil` loaded in
   159→`.task { }` on the tab view.
   160→
   161→Git root discovery: walk parent dirs from `cardURL.deletingLastPathComponent()`
   162→until a dir containing `.auto-claude` is found, max 6 levels. Cache the result.
   163→
   164→## Acceptance
   165→
   166→- `Meta` has `ac_spec_id: Option<String>` field (serde rename `ac_spec_id`)
   167→- `bop list` renders block bar + phase half-circle for cards with `ac_spec_id`
   168→- `bop status --watch` reloads plan on file changes
   169→- Quick Look shows "Plan" tab when `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable plan
   170→- Plan tab shows overall block bar + per-phase subtask list with SF Symbol icons
   171→- Git root discovery walks up from card dir (max 6 levels)
   172→- `make check` passes
   173→- `output/result.md` with ASCII screenshot of CLI output and description of QL tab
   174→

entries.content: Now update the subtask status in the implementation plan:

Subtask 4-2 is complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**Changes to `macos/bop/PreviewViewController.swift`:**

1. **`findGitRoot(from:)`** — Walks parent directories from the card URL up to 6 levels, checking for a `.auto-claude` directory at each level. Returns the URL of the git/project root if found.

2. **`resolveSpecDir(gitRoot:specId:)`** — Lists `.auto-claude/specs/` and finds the first directory matching the `<specId>-` prefix (e.g., `"027"` matches `"027-ac-progress-quicklook-cli"`).

3. **`loadAcPlan(cardURL:specId:)`** — Combines both helpers to load and decode `implementation_plan.json` from the resolved spec directory into an `AcPlan` struct.

4. **`preparePreviewOfFile`** — Added plan loading after bundle file enumeration: when `meta.acSpecId` is set, calls `loadAcPlan()` and passes the result to `BopCardPreview`.

5. **`BopCardPreview.acPlan`** — Changed from `@State var` to plain `var` since it's set once from the controller, not mutated by user interaction.
I'll start by reading the full file and understanding the existing patterns, especially the subtasksTab implementation.

entries.detail:
1→# AC implementation plan progress in Quick Look + CLI
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→Auto-Claude's `implementation_plan.json` has per-phase subtask state
     6→(pending / in_progress / completed) that gives a clear picture of how far
     7→along a job is. Neither the Quick Look card preview nor `bop list` surface
     8→this — only raw `progress: Int` from `meta.json` is shown. The goal is to
     9→pipe AC's phase/subtask tree into the card's visual layer with zero extra
    10→tooling: block progress bars in the CLI, and a dedicated "Plan" tab in Quick
    11→Look alongside the existing Subtasks tab.
    12→
    13→## Data model
    14→
    15→### 1. `ac_spec_id` field in `Meta`
    16→
    17→Add to `crates/bop-core/src/lib.rs`:
    18→
    19→```rust
    20→pub ac_spec_id: Option<String>,   // e.g. "022"
    21→```
    22→
    23→This is the only link needed. Quick Look and CLI resolve the full path:
    24→
    25→```
    26→<git_root>/.auto-claude/specs/<ac_spec_id>-*/implementation_plan.json
    27→```
    28→
    29→Use a glob search (`read_dir` + prefix match on `<ac_spec_id>-`) to find the
    30→spec dir — do not hardcode the slug.
    31→
    32→### 2. How `ac_spec_id` gets written
    33→
    34→Two entry points:
    35→
    36→**dispatch.nu** — when `write_approval` fires before spawning a pane, also
    37→search `.cards/` (all state dirs) for a card whose `meta.json` `id` matches
    38→the spec slug or whose `title` contains the spec ID. If found, write
    39→`ac_spec_id` into that card's meta. This is the dogfood path where bop uses
    40→itself to track its own development.
    41→
    42→**Adapter convention** — if an adapter runs AC internally, it can write
    43→`ac_spec_id` to `meta.json` via `write_meta` before exiting.
    44→
    45→For cards with no AC spec, `ac_spec_id` is absent — no change to rendering.
    46→
    47→## CLI changes (`crates/bop-cli/src/main.rs` or status command)
    48→
    49→### `bop list` / `bop status` inline progress
    50→
    51→When a card has `ac_spec_id` set, load `implementation_plan.json` and render
    52→a compact one-liner after the card row:
    53→
    54→```
    55→⚙ 022-atomic-write-meta   running   claude   6m 14s
    56→  ████████████░░░░  6/7   Phase 2: CLI + Docs  ◑
    57→```
    58→
    59→Format:
    60→- Block bar: 16 chars, `█` per completed subtask fraction, `░` remainder
    61→- `N/T` count: completed subtasks / total subtasks across all phases
    62→- Current phase name (truncated to 24 chars)
    63→- Phase completion half-circle: `○◔◑◕●` (0% 25% 50% 75% 100%)
    64→  - U+25CB, U+25D4, U+25D1, U+25D5, U+25CF — all BMP-safe
    65→
    66→Half-circle thresholds (fraction of subtasks in current phase done):
    67→- 0 % → `○`
    68→- 1–33 % → `◔`
    69→- 34–66 % → `◑`
    70→- 67–99 % → `◕`
    71→- 100 % → `●`
    72→
    73→Colors: completed subtasks = green, in_progress = amber, pending = dim.
    74→Only shown for cards where `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable file.
    75→
    76→### `bop status --watch` (spec 025)
    77→
    78→When the plan view is live, also reload `implementation_plan.json` on each
    79→notify event — it changes as the AC agent commits subtasks.
    80→
    81→## Quick Look changes (`macos/bop/PreviewViewController.swift`)
    82→
    83→### New tab: "Plan"
    84→
    85→Add `plan = "Plan"` to the `CardSection` enum (alongside `subtasks`).
    86→Show the tab only if `ac_spec_id` is set and `implementation_plan.json` loads.
    87→
    88→The Plan tab reads `implementation_plan.json` from the git root (walk up from
    89→the card dir via `../` until `.git` or `.auto-claude` is found).
    90→
    91→### New Codable structs
    92→
    93→```swift
    94→private struct AcPlan: Codable {
    95→    let phases: [AcPhase]
    96→}
    97→
    98→private struct AcPhase: Codable {
    99→    let id: String
   100→    let name: String
   101→    let subtasks: [AcSubtask]
   102→}
   103→
   104→private struct AcSubtask: Codable {
   105→    let id: String
   106→    let description: String
   107→    let status: String   // "pending" | "in_progress" | "completed"
   108→}
   109→```
   110→
   111→### Plan tab rendering
   112→
   113→Overall progress bar at top (same style as existing `subtasksTab` header):
   114→
   115→```
   116→8 of 12 subtasks complete          67%
   117→████████████░░░░░░░░
   118→```
   119→
   120→Then per-phase collapsible rows:
   121→
   122→```
   123→◉  Phase 1 — Crash Safety          ●●●●●  5/5
   124→   ✓ Make write_meta atomic
   125→   ✓ Make write_providers atomic
   126→   ✓ Add recover_orphans function
   127→   ✓ Call recover_orphans on startup
   128→   ✓ Add bop recover CLI command
   129→
   130→◔  Phase 2 — CLI + Docs            ●○○    1/3
   131→   ✓ Write result.md (in_progress)
   132→   ○ Run make check
   133→   ○ Final review
   134→```
   135→
   136→Glyph legend (BMP-safe, existing SF Symbols for Quick Look):
   137→- Phase status icon: `circle.fill` (done), `circle.lefthalf.filled` (partial),
   138→  `circle` (not started) — SF Symbols, no font dep
   139→- Subtask row: `checkmark.circle.fill` (completed, green),
   140→  `arrow.triangle.2.circlepath` (in_progress, amber), `circle` (pending, dim)
   141→  — matches the existing `subtasksTab` icon style
   142→
   143→Phase name row background: match existing card row style
   144→(`Color.black.opacity(0.15)` + `RoundedRectangle` border).
   145→
   146→### `BopCardMeta` addition
   147→
   148→```swift
   149→let acSpecId: String?
   150→
   151→enum CodingKeys: String, CodingKey {
   152→    // ... existing keys ...
   153→    case acSpecId = "ac_spec_id"
   154→}
   155→```
   156→
   157→Load `AcPlan` lazily when the Plan tab is first shown — do not block the
   158→initial card render. Use a `@State var acPlan: AcPlan? = nil` loaded in
   159→`.task { }` on the tab view.
   160→
   161→Git root discovery: walk parent dirs from `cardURL.deletingLastPathComponent()`
   162→until a dir containing `.auto-claude` is found, max 6 levels. Cache the result.
   163→
   164→## Acceptance
   165→
   166→- `Meta` has `ac_spec_id: Option<String>` field (serde rename `ac_spec_id`)
   167→- `bop list` renders block bar + phase half-circle for cards with `ac_spec_id`
   168→- `bop status --watch` reloads plan on file changes
   169→- Quick Look shows "Plan" tab when `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable plan
   170→- Plan tab shows overall block bar + per-phase subtask list with SF Symbol icons
   171→- Git root discovery walks up from card dir (max 6 levels)
   172→- `make check` passes
   173→- `output/result.md` with ASCII screenshot of CLI output and description of QL tab
   174→

entries.content: The issue is that `@ViewBuilder` interprets `if/else` and `switch` as view builder expressions, not regular assignments. I need to refactor to compute icon/color values outside the `@ViewBuilder` context.

entries.content:
Subtask 4-3 is complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**Plan Tab in Quick Look Preview** (`macos/bop/PreviewViewController.swift`)

1. **Overall progress header** — Shows "N of M subtasks complete" with percentage, matching the existing `subtasksTab` style
2. **Progress bar** — `GeometryReader`-based bar using `Color.barEmpty` / `Color.barFill`, proportional to completed subtasks
3. **Per-phase collapsible sections** with SF Symbol status icons:
   - `circle.fill` (green/`.stageActive`) — all subtasks in phase done
   - `circle.lefthalf.filled` (amber/`.pillOrange`) — partial progress
   - `circle` (dim/`.textMuted`) — not started
   - Chevron indicator + tap to collapse/expand via `@State collapsedPhases: Set<String>`
4. **Subtask rows** with status-specific icons:
   - `checkmark.circle.fill` (green) — completed
   - `arrow.triangle.2.circlepath` (amber) — in_progress  
   - `circle` (dim) — pending
5. **Helper functions** `phaseIconInfo()` and `subtaskIconInfo()` extracted to avoid `@ViewBuilder` issues with `if/switch` variable assignments

Build verified: **BUILD SUCCEEDED** ✅

1→#!/usr/bin/env nu
     2→# dispatch.nu — bop spec dispatcher
     3→#
     4→# Runs Auto-Claude specs in dependency-ordered waves with rate-limit-aware
     5→# pacing. Spawns Zellij panes in the current session.
     6→#
     7→# Usage:
     8→#   nu dispatch.nu plan              # Show full wave plan, no execution
     9→#   nu dispatch.nu run --wave 0      # Execute only Wave 0
    10→#   nu dispatch.nu run               # Execute all pending waves
    11→#   nu dispatch.nu run --yes         # Skip confirmation prompts
    12→#   nu dispatch.nu status            # Show what's done / pending / failed
    13→#   nu dispatch.nu reset --spec 001  # Mark a spec as pending again
    14→#   nu dispatch.nu mark-done 001     # Manually mark complete
    15→#   nu dispatch.nu mark-failed 001   # Manually mark failed
    16→#   nu dispatch.nu roadmap           # Spawn roadmap agent in Zellij pane
    17→#   nu dispatch.nu ideate            # Spawn ideation agent in Zellij pane
    18→
    19→const PYTHON      = "/Applications/Auto-Claude.app/Contents/Resources/python/bin/python3"
    20→const SITE_PKGS   = "/Applications/Auto-Claude.app/Contents/Resources/python-site-packages"
    21→const BACKEND     = "/Applications/Auto-Claude.app/Contents/Resources/backend"
    22→const PROJECT_DIR = "/Users/studio/bop"

    25→
    26→def zellij_session [] {
    27→  if "ZELLIJ_SESSION_NAME" in $env {
    28→    $env.ZELLIJ_SESSION_NAME
    29→  } else {
    30→    # Not inside Zellij — find the single active session, or error
    31→    let sessions = (^zellij list-sessions --no-formatting 2>/dev/null | lines | where { |l| ($l | str trim) != "" })
    32→    if ($sessions | length) == 1 {
    33→      $sessions | first | str trim
    34→    } else if ($sessions | length) > 1 {
    35→      error make { msg: $"Multiple Zellij sessions active: ($sessions | str join ', '). Set ZELLIJ_SESSION_NAME or run from inside a session." }
    36→    } else {
    37→      error make { msg: "No Zellij session found. Start one with: zellij --session bop" }
    38→    }
    39→  }
    40→}

   152→def mark_done [spec_id: string] {
   153→  let s = load_state
   154→  let s2 = $s | update completed ($s.completed | append $spec_id | uniq)
   155→  save_state $s2
   156→}
   157→
   158→def mark_failed [spec_id: string] {
   159→  let s = load_state
   160→  let s2 = $s | update failed ($s.failed | append $spec_id | uniq)
   161→  save_state $s2
   162→}
   163→
   164→def write_lock [wave: int] {
   165→  let ts = (date now | format date "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S")
   166→  {pid: "dispatch", wave: $wave, started: $ts, session: (zellij_session)} | to json --indent 2 | save --force $LOCK_FILE
   167→}
   168→
   169→def clear_lock [] {
   170→  if ($LOCK_FILE | path exists) { rm $LOCK_FILE }
   171→}
   172→
   173→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   174→# Pane helpers
   175→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   176→
   177→def spec_shell_cmd [spec_id: string, flag: string] {
   178→  $"PYTHONPATH=($SITE_PKGS) env -u CLAUDECODE ($PYTHON) ($BACKEND)/run.py --spec ($spec_id) --project-dir ($PROJECT_DIR) ($flag) && nu ($PROJECT_DIR)/dispatch.nu mark-done ($spec_id) || nu ($PROJECT_DIR)/dispatch.nu mark-failed ($spec_id)"
   179→}
   180→
   181→# Codex CLI dispatch — non-interactive exec using OpenAI OAuth from ~/.codex/auth.json
   18

1→# AC implementation plan progress in Quick Look + CLI
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→Auto-Claude's `implementation_plan.json` has per-phase subtask state
     6→(pending / in_progress / completed) that gives a clear picture of how far
     7→along a job is. Neither the Quick Look card preview nor `bop list` surface
     8→this — only raw `progress: Int` from `meta.json` is shown. The goal is to
     9→pipe AC's phase/subtask tree into the card's visual layer with zero extra
    10→tooling: block progress bars in the CLI, and a dedicated "Plan" tab in Quick
    11→Look alongside the existing Subtasks tab.
    12→
    13→## Data model
    14→
    15→### 1. `ac_spec_id` field in `Meta`
    16→
    17→Add to `crates/bop-core/src/lib.rs`:
    18→
    19→```rust
    20→pub ac_spec_id: Option<String>,   // e.g. "022"
    21→```
    22→
    23→This is the only link needed. Quick Look and CLI resolve the full path:
    24→
    25→```
    26→<git_root>/.auto-claude/specs/<ac_spec_id>-*/implementation_plan.json
    27→```
    28→
    29→Use a glob search (`read_dir` + prefix match on `<ac_spec_id>-`) to find the
    30→spec dir — do not hardcode the slug.
    31→
    32→### 2. How `ac_spec_id` gets written
    33→
    34→Two entry points:
    35→
    36→**dispatch.nu** — when `write_approval` fires before spawning a pane, also
    37→search `.cards/` (all state dirs) for a card whose `meta.json` `id` matches
    38→the spec slug or whose `title` contains the spec ID. If found, write
    39→`ac_spec_id` into that card's meta. This is the dogfood path where bop uses
    40→itself to track its own development.
    41→
    42→**Adapter convention** — if an adapter runs AC internally, it can write
    43→`ac_spec_id` to `meta.json` via `write_meta` before exiting.
    44→
    45→For cards with no AC spec, `ac_spec_id` is absent — no change to rendering.
    46→
    47→## CLI changes (`crates/bop-cli/src/main.rs` or status command)
    48→
    49→### `bop list` / `bop status` inline progress
    50→
    51→When a card has `ac_spec_id` set, load `implementation_plan.json` and render
    52→a compact one-liner after the card row:
    53→
    54→```
    55→⚙ 022-atomic-write-meta   running   claude   6m 14s
    56→  ████████████░░░░  6/7   Phase 2: CLI + Docs  ◑
    57→```
    58→
    59→Format:
    60→- Block bar: 16 chars, `█` per completed subtask fraction, `░` remainder
    61→- `N/T` count: completed subtasks / total subtasks across all phases
    62→- Current phase name (truncated to 24 chars)
    63→- Phase completion half-circle: `○◔◑◕●` (0% 25% 50% 75% 100%)
    64→  - U+25CB, U+25D4, U+25D1, U+25D5, U+25CF — all BMP-safe
    65→
    66→Half-circle thresholds (fraction of subtasks in current phase done):
    67→- 0 % → `○`
    68→- 1–33 % → `◔`
    69→- 34–66 % → `◑`
    70→- 67–99 % → `◕`
    71→- 100 % → `●`
    72→
    73→Colors: completed subtasks = green, in_progress = amber, pending = dim.
    74→Only shown for cards where `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable file.
    75→
    76→### `bop status --watch` (spec 025)
    77→
    78→When the plan view is live, also reload `implementation_plan.json` on each
    79→notify event — it changes as the AC agent commits subtasks.
    80→
    81→## Quick Look changes (`macos/bop/PreviewViewController.swift`)
    82→
    83→### New tab: "Plan"
    84→
    85→Add `plan = "Plan"` to the `CardSection` enum (alongside `subtasks`).
    86→Show the tab only if `ac_spec_id` is set and `implementation_plan.json` loads.
    87→
    88→The Plan tab reads `implementation_plan.json` from the git root (walk up from
    89→the card dir via `../` until `.git` or `.auto-claude` is found).
    90→
    91→### New Codable structs
    92→
    93→```swift
    94→private struct AcPlan: Codable {
    95→    let phases: [AcPhase]
    96→}
    97→
    98→private struct AcPhase: Codable {
    99→    let id: String
   100→    let name: String
   101→    let subtasks: [AcSubtask]
   102→}
   103→
   104→private struct AcSubtask: Codable {
   105→    let id: String
   106→    let description: String
   107→    let status: String   // "pending" | "in_progress" | "completed"
   108→}
   109→```
   110→
   111→### Plan tab rendering
   112→
   113→Overall progress bar at top (same style as existing `subtasksTab` header):
   114→
   115→```
   116→8 of 12 subtasks complete          67%
   117→████████████░░░░░░░░
   118→```
   119→
   120→Then per-phase collapsible rows:
   121→
   122→```
   123→◉  Phase 1 — Crash Safety          ●●●●●  5/5
   124→   ✓ Make write_meta atomic
   125→   ✓ Make write_providers atomic
   126→   ✓ Add recover_orphans function
   127→   ✓ Call recover_orphans on startup
   128→   ✓ Add bop recover CLI command
   129→
   130→◔  Phase 2 — CLI + Docs            ●○○    1/3
   131→   ✓ Write result.md (in_progress)
   132→   ○ Run make check
   133→   ○ Final review
   134→```
   135→
   136→Glyph legend (BMP-safe, existing SF Symbols for Quick Look):
   137→- Phase status icon: `circle.fill` (done), `circle.lefthalf.filled` (partial),
   138→  `circle` (not started) — SF Symbols, no font dep
   139→- Subtask row: `checkmark.circle.fill` (completed, green),
   140→  `arrow.triangle.2.circlepath` (in_progress, amber), `circle` (pending, dim)
   141→  — matches the existing `subtasksTab` icon style
   142→
   143→Phase name row background: match existing card row style
   144→(`Color.black.opacity(0.15)` + `RoundedRectangle` border).
   145→
   146→### `BopCardMeta` addition
   147→
   148→```swift
   149→let acSpecId: String?
   150→
   151→enum CodingKeys: String, CodingKey {
   152→    // ... existing keys ...
   153→    case acSpecId = "ac_spec_id"
   154→}
   155→```
   156→
   157→Load `AcPlan` lazily when the Plan tab is first shown — do not block the
   158→initial card render. Use a `@State var acPlan: AcPlan? = nil` loaded in
   159→`.task { }` on the tab view.
   160→
   161→Git root discovery: walk parent dirs from `cardURL.deletingLastPathComponent()`
   162→until a dir containing `.auto-claude` is found, max 6 levels. Cache the result.
   163→
   164→## Acceptance
   165→
   166→- `Meta` has `ac_spec_id: Option<String>` field (serde rename `ac_spec_id`)
   167→- `bop list` renders block bar + phase half-circle for cards with `ac_spec_id`
   168→- `bop status --watch` reloads plan on file changes
   169→- Quick Look shows "Plan" tab when `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable plan
   170→- Plan tab shows overall block bar + per-phase subtask list with SF Symbol icons
   171→- Git root discovery walks up from card dir (max 6 levels)
   172→- `make check` passes
   173→- `output/result.md` with ASCII screenshot of CLI output and description of QL tab
   174→

entries.content: Now update the implementation plan to mark subtask-5-1 as completed:

Done. Here's what was implemented:

## Summary — subtask-5-1: dispatch.nu Card ↔ Spec Linkage

### New function: `link_card_to_spec`
Added to `dispatch.nu` between `write_approval` and `wait_done` (~80 lines):

1. **Slug derivation**: Extracts the slug from the spec dir name (e.g., `027-ac-progress-quicklook-cli` → `ac-progress-quicklook-cli`)

2. **Card search**: Iterates through all 5 state directories (`pending`, `running`, `done`, `failed`, `merged`) in two passes:
   - Flat dirs: `.cards/<state>/*.jobcard/meta.json`
   - Team-prefixed dirs: `.cards/team-*/<state>/*.jobcard/meta.json`

3. **Match criteria**: A card matches if:
   - `meta.json` `id` field equals the spec slug, OR
   - `id` field contains the spec ID (e.g., "027"), OR
   - `title` field contains the spec ID

4. **Meta update**: When a match is found, reads `meta.json`, upserts `ac_spec_id` with the spec ID, writes back via `to json --indent 2 | save --force`

5. **Non-fatal**: Prints a dim `⊘` skip message if no card is found, yellow `⚠` warning if write fails, green `⊕` confirmation on success

### Wiring
Called from `run_spec` on line 324, immediately after `write_approval` and before spawning the pane.

entries.detail: /Users/studio/bop

1→# AC implementation plan progress in Quick Look + CLI
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→Auto-Claude's `implementation_plan.json` has per-phase subtask state
     6→(pending / in_progress / completed) that gives a clear picture of how far
     7→along a job is. Neither the Quick Look card preview nor `bop list` surface
     8→this — only raw `progress: Int` from `meta.json` is shown. The goal is to
     9→pipe AC's phase/subtask tree into the card's visual layer with zero extra
    10→tooling: block progress bars in the CLI, and a dedicated "Plan" tab in Quick
    11→Look alongside the existing Subtasks tab.
    12→
    13→## Data model
    14→
    15→### 1. `ac_spec_id` field in `Meta`
    16→
    17→Add to `crates/bop-core/src/lib.rs`:
    18→
    19→```rust
    20→pub ac_spec_id: Option<String>,   // e.g. "022"
    21→```
    22→
    23→This is the only link needed. Quick Look and CLI resolve the full path:
    24→
    25→```
    26→<git_root>/.auto-claude/specs/<ac_spec_id>-*/implementation_plan.json
    27→```
    28→
    29→Use a glob search (`read_dir` + prefix match on `<ac_spec_id>-`) to find the
    30→spec dir — do not hardcode the slug.
    31→
    32→### 2. How `ac_spec_id` gets written
    33→
    34→Two entry points:
    35→
    36→**dispatch.nu** — when `write_approval` fires before spawning a pane, also
    37→search `.cards/` (all state dirs) for a card whose `meta.json` `id` matches
    38→the spec slug or whose `title` contains the spec ID. If found, write
    39→`ac_spec_id` into that card's meta. This is the dogfood path where bop uses
    40→itself to track its own development.
    41→
    42→**Adapter convention** — if an adapter runs AC internally, it can write
    43→`ac_spec_id` to `meta.json` via `write_meta` before exiting.
    44→
    45→For cards with no AC spec, `ac_spec_id` is absent — no change to rendering.
    46→
    47→## CLI changes (`crates/bop-cli/src/main.rs` or status command)
    48→
    49→### `bop list` / `bop status` inline progress
    50→
    51→When a card has `ac_spec_id` set, load `implementation_plan.json` and render
    52→a compact one-liner after the card row:
    53→
    54→```
    55→⚙ 022-atomic-write-meta   running   claude   6m 14s
    56→  ████████████░░░░  6/7   Phase 2: CLI + Docs  ◑
    57→```
    58→
    59→Format:
    60→- Block bar: 16 chars, `█` per completed subtask fraction, `░` remainder
    61→- `N/T` count: completed subtasks / total subtasks across all phases
    62→- Current phase name (truncated to 24 chars)
    63→- Phase completion half-circle: `○◔◑◕●` (0% 25% 50% 75% 100%)
    64→  - U+25CB, U+25D4, U+25D1, U+25D5, U+25CF — all BMP-safe
    65→
    66→Half-circle thresholds (fraction of subtasks in current phase done):
    67→- 0 % → `○`
    68→- 1–33 % → `◔`
    69→- 34–66 % → `◑`
    70→- 67–99 % → `◕`
    71→- 100 % → `●`
    72→
    73→Colors: completed subtasks = green, in_progress = amber, pending = dim.
    74→Only shown for cards where `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable file.
    75→
    76→### `bop status --watch` (spec 025)
    77→
    78→When the plan view is live, also reload `implementation_plan.json` on each
    79→notify event — it changes as the AC agent commits subtasks.
    80→
    81→## Quick Look changes (`macos/bop/PreviewViewController.swift`)
    82→
    83→### New tab: "Plan"
    84→
    85→Add `plan = "Plan"` to the `CardSection` enum (alongside `subtasks`).
    86→Show the tab only if `ac_spec_id` is set and `implementation_plan.json` loads.
    87→
    88→The Plan tab reads `implementation_plan.json` from the git root (walk up from
    89→the card dir via `../` until `.git` or `.auto-claude` is found).
    90→
    91→### New Codable structs
    92→
    93→```swift
    94→private struct AcPlan: Codable {
    95→    let phases: [AcPhase]
    96→}
    97→
    98→private struct AcPhase: Codable {
    99→    let id: String
   100→    let name: String
   101→    let subtasks: [AcSubtask]
   102→}
   103→
   104→private struct AcSubtask: Codable {
   105→    let id: String
   106→    let description: String
   107→    let status: String   // "pending" | "in_progress" | "completed"
   108→}
   109→```
   110→
   111→### Plan tab rendering
   112→
   113→Overall progress bar at top (same style as existing `subtasksTab` header):
   114→
   115→```
   116→8 of 12 subtasks complete          67%
   117→████████████░░░░░░░░
   118→```
   119→
   120→Then per-phase collapsible rows:
   121→
   122→```
   123→◉  Phase 1 — Crash Safety          ●●●●●  5/5
   124→   ✓ Make write_meta atomic
   125→   ✓ Make write_providers atomic
   126→   ✓ Add recover_orphans function
   127→   ✓ Call recover_orphans on startup
   128→   ✓ Add bop recover CLI command
   129→
   130→◔  Phase 2 — CLI + Docs            ●○○    1/3
   131→   ✓ Write result.md (in_progress)
   132→   ○ Run make check
   133→   ○ Final review
   134→```
   135→
   136→Glyph legend (BMP-safe, existing SF Symbols for Quick Look):
   137→- Phase status icon: `circle.fill` (done), `circle.lefthalf.filled` (partial),
   138→  `circle` (not started) — SF Symbols, no font dep
   139→- Subtask row: `checkmark.circle.fill` (completed, green),
   140→  `arrow.triangle.2.circlepath` (in_progress, amber), `circle` (pending, dim)
   141→  — matches the existing `subtasksTab` icon style
   142→
   143→Phase name row background: match existing card row style
   144→(`Color.black.opacity(0.15)` + `RoundedRectangle` border).
   145→
   146→### `BopCardMeta` addition
   147→
   148→```swift
   149→let acSpecId: String?
   150→
   151→enum CodingKeys: String, CodingKey {
   152→    // ... existing keys ...
   153→    case acSpecId = "ac_spec_id"
   154→}
   155→```
   156→
   157→Load `AcPlan` lazily when the Plan tab is first shown — do not block the
   158→initial card render. Use a `@State var acPlan: AcPlan? = nil` loaded in
   159→`.task { }` on the tab view.
   160→
   161→Git root discovery: walk parent dirs from `cardURL.deletingLastPathComponent()`
   162→until a dir containing `.auto-claude` is found, max 6 levels. Cache the result.
   163→
   164→## Acceptance
   165→
   166→- `Meta` has `ac_spec_id: Option<String>` field (serde rename `ac_spec_id`)
   167→- `bop list` renders block bar + phase half-circle for cards with `ac_spec_id`
   168→- `bop status --watch` reloads plan on file changes
   169→- Quick Look shows "Plan" tab when `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable plan
   170→- Plan tab shows overall block bar + per-phase subtask list with SF Symbol icons
   171→- Git root discovery walks up from card dir (max 6 levels)
   172→- `make check` passes
   173→- `output/result.md` with ASCII screenshot of CLI output and description of QL tab
   174→

entries.detail:
1→# AC implementation plan progress in Quick Look + CLI
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→Auto-Claude's `implementation_plan.json` has per-phase subtask state
     6→(pending / in_progress / completed) that gives a clear picture of how far
     7→along a job is. Neither the Quick Look card preview nor `bop list` surface
     8→this — only raw `progress: Int` from `meta.json` is shown. The goal is to
     9→pipe AC's phase/subtask tree into the card's visual layer with zero extra
    10→tooling: block progress bars in the CLI, and a dedicated "Plan" tab in Quick
    11→Look alongside the existing Subtasks tab.
    12→
    13→## Data model
    14→
    15→### 1. `ac_spec_id` field in `Meta`
    16→
    17→Add to `crates/bop-core/src/lib.rs`:
    18→
    19→```rust
    20→pub ac_spec_id: Option<String>,   // e.g. "022"
    21→```
    22→
    23→This is the only link needed. Quick Look and CLI resolve the full path:
    24→
    25→```
    26→<git_root>/.auto-claude/specs/<ac_spec_id>-*/implementation_plan.json
    27→```
    28→
    29→Use a glob search (`read_dir` + prefix match on `<ac_spec_id>-`) to find the
    30→spec dir — do not hardcode the slug.
    31→
    32→### 2. How `ac_spec_id` gets written
    33→
    34→Two entry points:
    35→
    36→**dispatch.nu** — when `write_approval` fires before spawning a pane, also
    37→search `.cards/` (all state dirs) for a card whose `meta.json` `id` matches
    38→the spec slug or whose `title` contains the spec ID. If found, write
    39→`ac_spec_id` into that card's meta. This is the dogfood path where bop uses
    40→itself to track its own development.
    41→
    42→**Adapter convention** — if an adapter runs AC internally, it can write
    43→`ac_spec_id` to `meta.json` via `write_meta` before exiting.
    44→
    45→For cards with no AC spec, `ac_spec_id` is absent — no change to rendering.
    46→
    47→## CLI changes (`crates/bop-cli/src/main.rs` or status command)
    48→
    49→### `bop list` / `bop status` inline progress
    50→
    51→When a card has `ac_spec_id` set, load `implementation_plan.json` and render
    52→a compact one-liner after the card row:
    53→
    54→```
    55→⚙ 022-atomic-write-meta   running   claude   6m 14s
    56→  ████████████░░░░  6/7   Phase 2: CLI + Docs  ◑
    57→```
    58→
    59→Format:
    60→- Block bar: 16 chars, `█` per completed subtask fraction, `░` remainder
    61→- `N/T` count: completed subtasks / total subtasks across all phases
    62→- Current phase name (truncated to 24 chars)
    63→- Phase completion half-circle: `○◔◑◕●` (0% 25% 50% 75% 100%)
    64→  - U+25CB, U+25D4, U+25D1, U+25D5, U+25CF — all BMP-safe
    65→
    66→Half-circle thresholds (fraction of subtasks in current phase done):
    67→- 0 % → `○`
    68→- 1–33 % → `◔`
    69→- 34–66 % → `◑`
    70→- 67–99 % → `◕`
    71→- 100 % → `●`
    72→
    73→Colors: completed subtasks = green, in_progress = amber, pending = dim.
    74→Only shown for cards where `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable file.
    75→
    76→### `bop status --watch` (spec 025)
    77→
    78→When the plan view is live, also reload `implementation_plan.json` on each
    79→notify event — it changes as the AC agent commits subtasks.
    80→
    81→## Quick Look changes (`macos/bop/PreviewViewController.swift`)
    82→
    83→### New tab: "Plan"
    84→
    85→Add `plan = "Plan"` to the `CardSection` enum (alongside `subtasks`).
    86→Show the tab only if `ac_spec_id` is set and `implementation_plan.json` loads.
    87→
    88→The Plan tab reads `implementation_plan.json` from the git root (walk up from
    89→the card dir via `../` until `.git` or `.auto-claude` is found).
    90→
    91→### New Codable structs
    92→
    93→```swift
    94→private struct AcPlan: Codable {
    95→    let phases: [AcPhase]
    96→}
    97→
    98→private struct AcPhase: Codable {
    99→    let id: String
   100→    let name: String
   101→    let subtasks: [AcSubtask]
   102→}
   103→
   104→private struct AcSubtask: Codable {
   105→    let id: String
   106→    let description: String
   107→    let status: String   // "pending" | "in_progress" | "completed"
   108→}
   109→```
   110→
   111→### Plan tab rendering
   112→
   113→Overall progress bar at top (same style as existing `subtasksTab` header):
   114→
   115→```
   116→8 of 12 subtasks complete          67%
   117→████████████░░░░░░░░
   118→```
   119→
   120→Then per-phase collapsible rows:
   121→
   122→```
   123→◉  Phase 1 — Crash Safety          ●●●●●  5/5
   124→   ✓ Make write_meta atomic
   125→   ✓ Make write_providers atomic
   126→   ✓ Add recover_orphans function
   127→   ✓ Call recover_orphans on startup
   128→   ✓ Add bop recover CLI command
   129→
   130→◔  Phase 2 — CLI + Docs            ●○○    1/3
   131→   ✓ Write result.md (in_progress)
   132→   ○ Run make check
   133→   ○ Final review
   134→```
   135→
   136→Glyph legend (BMP-safe, existing SF Symbols for Quick Look):
   137→- Phase status icon: `circle.fill` (done), `circle.lefthalf.filled` (partial),
   138→  `circle` (not started) — SF Symbols, no font dep
   139→- Subtask row: `checkmark.circle.fill` (completed, green),
   140→  `arrow.triangle.2.circlepath` (in_progress, amber), `circle` (pending, dim)
   141→  — matches the existing `subtasksTab` icon style
   142→
   143→Phase name row background: match existing card row style
   144→(`Color.black.opacity(0.15)` + `RoundedRectangle` border).
   145→
   146→### `BopCardMeta` addition
   147→
   148→```swift
   149→let acSpecId: String?
   150→
   151→enum CodingKeys: String, CodingKey {
   152→    // ... existing keys ...
   153→    case acSpecId = "ac_spec_id"
   154→}
   155→```
   156→
   157→Load `AcPlan` lazily when the Plan tab is first shown — do not block the
   158→initial card render. Use a `@State var acPlan: AcPlan? = nil` loaded in
   159→`.task { }` on the tab view.
   160→
   161→Git root discovery: walk parent dirs from `cardURL.deletingLastPathComponent()`
   162→until a dir containing `.auto-claude` is found, max 6 levels. Cache the result.
   163→
   164→## Acceptance
   165→
   166→- `Meta` has `ac_spec_id: Option<String>` field (serde rename `ac_spec_id`)
   167→- `bop list` renders block bar + phase half-circle for cards with `ac_spec_id`
   168→- `bop status --watch` reloads plan on file changes
   169→- Quick Look shows "Plan" tab when `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable plan
   170→- Plan tab shows overall block bar + per-phase subtask list with SF Symbol icons
   171→- Git root discovery walks up from card dir (max 6 levels)
   172→- `make check` passes
   173→- `output/result.md` with ASCII screenshot of CLI output and description of QL tab
   174→

    45→- CardView already has phase_name/phase_frac — enrichment fills these from plan data
    46→- New fields: ac_subtasks_done/ac_subtasks_total for N/T display
    47→- Half-circle glyphs (○◔◑◕●) use DIFFERENT thresholds than existing moon_glyph
    48→- Plan loaded lazily only when ac_spec_id is set — no perf impact on cards without AC
    49→- Git root discovery: walk parent dirs max 6 levels, look for .auto-claude/
    50→- spec dir resolution: glob <git_root>/.auto-claude/specs/<id>-*
    51→
    52→Risk Assessment: MEDIUM
    53→- All changes are additive (new field, new module, new tab)
    54→- Existing behavior unchanged for cards without ac_spec_id
    55→- serde(default) ensures backward compatibility with old meta.json files
    56→
    57→=== STARTUP COMMAND ===
    58→
    59→To continue building this spec, run:
    60→
    61→  PYTHONPATH=$(python3 -c 'import site; print(site.getsitepackages()[0])') \
    62→    env -u CLAUDECODE python3 \
    63→    /Applications/Auto-Claude.app/Contents/Resources/backend/run.py \
    64→    --spec 027 --project-dir /Users/studio/bop --direct
    65→
    66→=== END SESSION 1 ===

     6→and nucleo 0.5. The TUI provides a kanban-board interface for managing job cards
     7→with horizontal columns, overlays, fuzzy filtering, and context-sensitive
     8→keyboard navigation. Entry point: `bop ui`.

entries.detail:
1→# AC implementation plan progress in Quick Look + CLI
     2→
     3→## Context
     4→
     5→Auto-Claude's `implementation_plan.json` has per-phase subtask state
     6→(pending / in_progress / completed) that gives a clear picture of how far
     7→along a job is. Neither the Quick Look card preview nor `bop list` surface
     8→this — only raw `progress: Int` from `meta.json` is shown. The goal is to
     9→pipe AC's phase/subtask tree into the card's visual layer with zero extra
    10→tooling: block progress bars in the CLI, and a dedicated "Plan" tab in Quick
    11→Look alongside the existing Subtasks tab.
    12→
    13→## Data model
    14→
    15→### 1. `ac_spec_id` field in `Meta`
    16→
    17→Add to `crates/bop-core/src/lib.rs`:
    18→
    19→```rust
    20→pub ac_spec_id: Option<String>,   // e.g. "022"
    21→```
    22→
    23→This is the only link needed. Quick Look and CLI resolve the full path:
    24→
    25→```
    26→<git_root>/.auto-claude/specs/<ac_spec_id>-*/implementation_plan.json
    27→```
    28→
    29→Use a glob search (`read_dir` + prefix match on `<ac_spec_id>-`) to find the
    30→spec dir — do not hardcode the slug.
    31→
    32→### 2. How `ac_spec_id` gets written
    33→
    34→Two entry points:
    35→
    36→**dispatch.nu** — when `write_approval` fires before spawning a pane, also
    37→search `.cards/` (all state dirs) for a card whose `meta.json` `id` matches
    38→the spec slug or whose `title` contains the spec ID. If found, write
    39→`ac_spec_id` into that card's meta. This is the dogfood path where bop uses
    40→itself to track its own development.
    41→
    42→**Adapter convention** — if an adapter runs AC internally, it can write
    43→`ac_spec_id` to `meta.json` via `write_meta` before exiting.
    44→
    45→For cards with no AC spec, `ac_spec_id` is absent — no change to rendering.
    46→
    47→## CLI changes (`crates/bop-cli/src/main.rs` or status command)
    48→
    49→### `bop list` / `bop status` inline progress
    50→
    51→When a card has `ac_spec_id` set, load `implementation_plan.json` and render
    52→a compact one-liner after the card row:
    53→
    54→```
    55→⚙ 022-atomic-write-meta   running   claude   6m 14s
    56→  ████████████░░░░  6/7   Phase 2: CLI + Docs  ◑
    57→```
    58→
    59→Format:
    60→- Block bar: 16 chars, `█` per completed subtask fraction, `░` remainder
    61→- `N/T` count: completed subtasks / total subtasks across all phases
    62→- Current phase name (truncated to 24 chars)
    63→- Phase completion half-circle: `○◔◑◕●` (0% 25% 50% 75% 100%)
    64→  - U+25CB, U+25D4, U+25D1, U+25D5, U+25CF — all BMP-safe
    65→
    66→Half-circle thresholds (fraction of subtasks in current phase done):
    67→- 0 % → `○`
    68→- 1–33 % → `◔`
    69→- 34–66 % → `◑`
    70→- 67–99 % → `◕`
    71→- 100 % → `●`
    72→
    73→Colors: completed subtasks = green, in_progress = amber, pending = dim.
    74→Only shown for cards where `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable file.
    75→
    76→### `bop status --watch` (spec 025)
    77→
    78→When the plan view is live, also reload `implementation_plan.json` on each
    79→notify event — it changes as the AC agent commits subtasks.
    80→
    81→## Quick Look changes (`macos/bop/PreviewViewController.swift`)
    82→
    83→### New tab: "Plan"
    84→
    85→Add `plan = "Plan"` to the `CardSection` enum (alongside `subtasks`).
    86→Show the tab only if `ac_spec_id` is set and `implementation_plan.json` loads.
    87→
    88→The Plan tab reads `implementation_plan.json` from the git root (walk up from
    89→the card dir via `../` until `.git` or `.auto-claude` is found).
    90→
    91→### New Codable structs
    92→
    93→```swift
    94→private struct AcPlan: Codable {
    95→    let phases: [AcPhase]
    96→}
    97→
    98→private struct AcPhase: Codable {
    99→    let id: String
   100→    let name: String
   101→    let subtasks: [AcSubtask]
   102→}
   103→
   104→private struct AcSubtask: Codable {
   105→    let id: String
   106→    let description: String
   107→    let status: String   // "pending" | "in_progress" | "completed"
   108→}
   109→```
   110→
   111→### Plan tab rendering
   112→
   113→Overall progress bar at top (same style as existing `subtasksTab` header):
   114→
   115→```
   116→8 of 12 subtasks complete          67%
   117→████████████░░░░░░░░
   118→```
   119→
   120→Then per-phase collapsible rows:
   121→
   122→```
   123→◉  Phase 1 — Crash Safety          ●●●●●  5/5
   124→   ✓ Make write_meta atomic
   125→   ✓ Make write_providers atomic
   126→   ✓ Add recover_orphans function
   127→   ✓ Call recover_orphans on startup
   128→   ✓ Add bop recover CLI command
   129→
   130→◔  Phase 2 — CLI + Docs            ●○○    1/3
   131→   ✓ Write result.md (in_progress)
   132→   ○ Run make check
   133→   ○ Final review
   134→```
   135→
   136→Glyph legend (BMP-safe, existing SF Symbols for Quick Look):
   137→- Phase status icon: `circle.fill` (done), `circle.lefthalf.filled` (partial),
   138→  `circle` (not started) — SF Symbols, no font dep
   139→- Subtask row: `checkmark.circle.fill` (completed, green),
   140→  `arrow.triangle.2.circlepath` (in_progress, amber), `circle` (pending, dim)
   141→  — matches the existing `subtasksTab` icon style
   142→
   143→Phase name row background: match existing card row style
   144→(`Color.black.opacity(0.15)` + `RoundedRectangle` border).
   145→
   146→### `BopCardMeta` addition
   147→
   148→```swift
   149→let acSpecId: String?
   150→
   151→enum CodingKeys: String, CodingKey {
   152→    // ... existing keys ...
   153→    case acSpecId = "ac_spec_id"
   154→}
   155→```
   156→
   157→Load `AcPlan` lazily when the Plan tab is first shown — do not block the
   158→initial card render. Use a `@State var acPlan: AcPlan? = nil` loaded in
   159→`.task { }` on the tab view.
   160→
   161→Git root discovery: walk parent dirs from `cardURL.deletingLastPathComponent()`
   162→until a dir containing `.auto-claude` is found, max 6 levels. Cache the result.
   163→
   164→## Acceptance
   165→
   166→- `Meta` has `ac_spec_id: Option<String>` field (serde rename `ac_spec_id`)
   167→- `bop list` renders block bar + phase half-circle for cards with `ac_spec_id`
   168→- `bop status --watch` reloads plan on file changes
   169→- Quick Look shows "Plan" tab when `ac_spec_id` resolves to a readable plan
   170→- Plan tab shows overall block bar + per-phase subtask list with SF Symbol icons
   171→- Git root discovery walks up from card dir (max 6 levels)
   172→- `make check` passes
   173→- `output/result.md` with ASCII screenshot of CLI output and description of QL tab
